ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the climate metric (e.g., precipitation, temperature) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data_types table */,
  "collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the collection_methods table */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the datasets table */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table (creator) */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table (updater) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_method_id") REFERENCES collection_methods ("collection_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_methods" (
  "collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection method */,
  "collection_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
